prompt: Create a wide-angle, photorealistic but slightly surreal music-performance scene in a colorful kawaii pop room. In the foreground, place exactly 1 main performer, an androgynous young rock musician with dark hair, leaning over a large black Yamaha-style electronic keyboard on an X-stand, left hand on the keys and right hand holding exactly 1 oversized glossy red megaphone pointed downward. The main performer wears exactly 1 black hoodie with a cute cartoon cat graphic on the chest, layered silver necklaces, studded bracelets, rings, dark pants, and black nail polish; obscure the face with a flat rectangular blur block for privacy. In the background on a small raised platform, place exactly 1 drummer, a punk drummer with bright red hair, seated behind exactly 1 large silver Pearl-style double-bass drum kit with 2 bass drums, 3 toms, 1 snare, and multiple chrome cymbal stands; blur the drummer’s face. The room should have a bright pink-and-yellow checkerboard floor, pastel pink walls, a plush pink sofa with round pillows, turquoise shelves and drawers, cute toys, colorful art posters of anime/pop princess characters, and a playful toy-store/studio atmosphere. Behind the performers, include a visible urban street or shopping arcade scene through a large opening or chroma-key-like composited backdrop, with small distant pedestrians, creating the feeling of a staged music video set. Use saturated colors, glossy surfaces, energetic J-pop/punk styling, realistic lens perspective, mild fisheye distortion, sharp foreground detail, and no added captions or watermarks.
